segments.text: Welcome to RestoreAssist. Let's get your restoration business ready to work.
First, your business details. Enter your A B N and we'll pull your legal name and trading details straight from the Australian Business Register.
Next, your brand. Add your logo and colours, so every report and invoice you send out looks like yours.
Then your pricing. Set your labour rates and administration fee once, and RestoreAssist applies them automatically.
That's it. Once your setup checks pass, your workspace goes live. Welcome aboard.
